description: CompositionMaroon round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has three-quarter sleeves and graphic print and sequin work on the frontFitComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryVacation in style in this t-shirt from wrangler. The sleeves, sequin detailing and the round neck exude feminine style, while the graphic print on the front showcases your happy spirit. Team this with jeans and heeled sandals for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 33”
